meaning: n.小溪,小河,<主英>小港,小湾
examples: I'll bet we could find some at North Creek—in the mine.
Wombat Creek Winery is an independent privately owned company producing fine wine as an art.
"There's Toad Hall," said the Rat; "and that creek on the left, where the notice-board says, Private."
The longer of the two follows the creek on a route taken by the gold prospectors.
An investigation is under way into a wolf found slain in nearby Apache Creek.
